plot outline: Astronaut Roy McBride (Brad Pitt) travels to the outer edges of the solar system to find his missing father and unravel a mystery that threatens the survival of our planet. His journey will uncover secrets that challenge the nature of human existence and our place in the cosmos.
title: Ad Astra
akas: Xing ji ren wu (Malaysia, Mandarin title)
